name: Peanut Butter Ice Cream Pie with Hot Fudge Sa
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all pie ingredients except whole peanuts, mix well.
2. Spoon mixture into shell and top with whole peanuts.
3. Freeze until firm.
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, combine chocolate chips, evaporated milk, and sugar.
2. Stir until melted and smooth.
3. Serve warm or cool over the pie.
